name: I was running when I slipped at work, will they say it's my fault?
description: No-fault system—your actions rarely deny workers' comp benefits.

mainEntity.name: I was running when I slipped at work, will they say it's my fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system—your actions rarely deny workers' comp benefits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault, so your contributory negligence doesn't bar benefits in Utah or Idaho.** You get coverage regardless of horseplay unless intentional misconduct.[1] Key factors: (1) Benefits reduced only for intoxication; (2) Employer can't deny for partial fault; (3) Focus on injury causation. Still report fully. Lawyer protects against blame-shifting.
